top_signals.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
top_signals.summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan ‘strongly urged’ China to reconsider missile test in Pacific
top_signals.summary: The Chinese Navy successfully conducted the test launch of a "strategic missile" by a nuclear submarine into the Pacific Ocean on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Son bets the house on AI
top_signals.summary: The veteran investor has put himself at the centre of the global AI boom. Some think he now has too much control
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bangladesh power cuts deepen as government struggles to pay bills
Concerns emerge in Fukushima over Reconstruction Agency’s expiration
top_signals.summary: Residents of the prefecture fear a watering down of the focus on reconstruction in the event its ambit is absorbed by a new Disaster Management Agency.
